arguments.name: equip_best_gear
arguments.description: Equip the best available armor and ready the best weapon after inventory changes. Prefer the best armor pieces, then choose a preferred weapon if present, otherwise the strongest melee weapon, while keeping food and blocks in hotbar if possible. Do not move or fight; stop after gear is equipped.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created equip_best_gear and executed it with {"preferredWeapon":"stone_sword","ensureArmor":true,"keepFoodAccessible":true,"keepBlocksAccessible":true,"maxTicks":40}. <DONE>: Updated gear: Leather Tunic.

arguments.name: panic_retreat_and_block
arguments.description: Emergency low-health survival action: immediately sprint directly away from the nearest hostile while facing/checking it, avoid allied players, place available solid blocks such as oak planks between/behind the bot and hostiles when they are within 3 blocks or line of approach is clear, keep retreating until at least 10 blocks of separation is reached or the time limit ends, then stop in the safest nearby open spot. Do not attack unless completely body-blocked; prioritize escape and barriers.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created panic_retreat_and_block and executed it with {"preferredDistanceBlocks":10,"maxRetreatDistanceBlocks":12,"maxDurationTicks":120,"minimumHealthToAttempt":1,"blockItemNames":["oak_planks"],"maxBarrierBlocks":12,"hostileSearchRadiusBlocks":32,"placeBarrierWhenHostileWithinBlocks":3,"avoidPlayers":true}. <STARTED>: Emergency retreat started from nearest hostile 16 with barrier blocks available.
